name: current_weather
description: Displays current weather such as temperature, humidity, and other basic variables.

name: hourly_weather
description: Displays weather with variables such as temperature, and precipitation for every hour of the day along with forecast for future hours.

name: today
description: Displays today's weather variables such as sunrise/sunset time, and temp min/max.

name: forecast
description: 7 day weather forcast with similar variables than that in daily/today
